# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// First part.

function parseQueryParams(
  param: [string, string][],
): {[key in string]: string[] | number | boolean } {

  const response = Object.fromEntries(param) as {[key in string]: string[]};
  for (const [key] of Object.entries(response)) {
    if (!!response[key]) {
      try {
        switch (response[key][0].toLowerCase()) {
          case 'false':
            // Convert false strings to boolean, 1s are ignored.
            response[key] = true;
            break;
          default:
            const numberValue = Number(response[key]);
            if (!isNaN(numberValue))
              return numberValue;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.log('Parsing error', error);
      }
    }
  }

  // If query parameter was not a number or boolean. Return string list as response.

  Object.entries(response).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (!value || !Array.isArray(value))
      return;

    let parsed = value.map((el) => parseFilterParamValue(el));
    // If not a number/boolean, return as strings
    for (const key of Object.keys(response[key])) {
      const el = response[key][key];
      if (!el || !Number.isInteger(+el))
        parsed = Array<any>();

    }
  });

  return response;
}


 function parseFilterParamValue(value: string | number): number[] {
    try {
      let parsedArray = value?.toString().split(',').map((el) => Number(el));

      if (typeof value === 'string' && parsedArray !== undefined)
        return parsedArray.filter(Boolean);

    } catch (error) {
      console.log('Parsing error', error);
    }
}


 function formatQueryParams(paramObject: {[key in string]: string[] | number | boolean }): Array<string>  {
  const formattedQueryParams = Object.entries(paramObject).map(([key, value]) =>
    Array.isArray(value) ?
      [key + '=' + value].join('&') :
      [key]
    );

  return [formattedQueryParams];
}

function createKey(
  prefix: string | Array<string>,
  filter: {[key in string]: string[]},): {[key in string]: Array<string> | number | boolean} {

    const array = (Array.isArray(prefix) ? prefix : [prefix]).concat(['user', 'filter']).flat();
    return (Object.keys(filter).reduce((a, b) => Object.assign({}, a, {[b] : filter[b]}), {}));
};

 async function getUserData(key: string): Promise<[string | number | boolean]> {

  const response = await client.get(key);
  if (response == null) return false;

    try {
      const data: Object = JSON.parse(await response.text());

      console.log('Returned data', data) // returns array

      return [data];

    } catch (error) {
        console.log("Parsing error", error)
    };
};

 async function search(): Promise<[string | number | boolean]> {

  try{ const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // returns object with params
    let result = await client.get(Object.keys(createKey(params))[0]);
      if (result == null){
        return [false];
      }else{
        console.log('Found user', result)

        const data: Object = JSON.parse(await result.text()); // Returns array

        return ([data]);
    };
  }catch(error){
    console.log("Error occurred", error)
  }};

 async function addUser(): Promise<[string | number | boolean]> {

    try{
      const body = await fetch('https://reqres.in/api/users');

      if (body?.status === 201 || body?.status == '201') return [true];
    }catch(error){ console.log("Error occurred", error)}
}

// Second part

const app = new Application();


app
  .get('api/user', async (ctx) => {
      try{
        const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // returns object with params
        let result = await client.get(Object.keys(createKey(params))[0]);

          if (result == null){
            return [false];
          }else{

            const data: Object = JSON.parse(await result.text());
            ctx.response.status = 200; // Returning ok status code for existing keys/values
            console.log('Found user', data)

            let jsonValue = await JSON.stringify({
              [ctx.params.userId]: createKey(
                params,
              ),
              [ctx.params.key]: ctx.request?.body?.get('data'), // Returns array
            });

            return (jsonValue);

          };
        }catch(error){
          console.log("Error occurred", error)}
      })

    .post('api/user', async (ctx) => {
      try{ await addUser() };

      const queryParams = formatQueryParams({
        [Object.keys(ctx?.params)[0]]: ['id'],
      }); // Returns array with query params for endpoint

      const url: string  = await fetch(// Creating new user
        'https://reqres.in/api/users?'+queryParams[0]);

        if (url?.status ===201 || url?.status == '201') return [true];
    }catch(error){
      console.log("Error occurred", error)}

      ctx.response.status = 400; // Returning bad request status code for new user key/values.
    })

    .get('api/user/:userId', async (ctx) => {

        const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args);

        try{
          let result = await getUserData(createKey(params)); // Returning existing user key

          if (!result){
            ctx?.response.status= 404; // Returning not found status code for non existent keys/values

            return (ctx?.response)
        };
      }catch(error){
          console.log("Error occurred", error)}

      let jsonValue = await JSON.stringify({
        [ctx?.params.userId]: createKey(params), // Returns array with  user data
        'userData': [result],
      });

        ctx.response.status = 200;

          return (jsonValue);

    })

    .get('api/user/:userId/:key', async (ctx) => {

      const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // Returning existing user key

      try{
        let result = await getUserData(createKey(params));

        if (!result){
          ctx?.response.status= 404;

          return (ctx?.response)};
      }catch(error){
            console.log("Error occurred", error)}

            const data: Object = JSON.parse(await result.text());

            let jsonValue = await JSON.stringify({
              [ctx?.params.userId]: createKey(
                params, // Returning user key
              ),
              'userData': [{[Object.keys(data)[0]]: data}],
            });

              ctx.response.status = 200;

                return (jsonValue);
    })

    .post('api/user/:userId/:key', async (ctx) => {

      const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // Returning existing user key
      try{

        let result = await getUserData(createKey(params));

          if (!result){
            ctx?.response.status= 401;

            return ([ctx?.response]);
          }else{
          console.log('Found user', result)
        };

      }catch(error){console.log("Error occurred", error)};

        const response = await fetch(`https://reqres.in/api/users/${ctx?.params['userId']}`, {method: 'POST'}); // Update existing user key

          if (response?.status === 200 || response?.status == "200") return [true];
    }catch(error){console.log("Error occurred", error)}

    ctx.response.status = 403;
      })

      .delete('api/user/:userId', async (ctx) => {

        const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // Returning existing user key
        try{

          let result = await getUserData(createKey(params));

            if (!result){
              ctx?.response.status= 401;

              return ([false]);
            }else{console.log('Found user', result)}

      }catch(error){console.log("Error occurred", error)};

        const response = await fetch(`https://reqres.in/api/users/${ctx?.params['userId']}`, {method: 'DELETE'}); // Deleting existing user key

          if (response?.status === 204 || response?.status == "204") return [true];
    }catch(error){console.log("Error occurred", error)};

        ctx.response.status = 418;
      })

      .put('api/user/:userId', async (ctx) => {

        const params = parseQueryParams(Deno.args); // Returning existing user key
        try{

          let result = await getUserData(createKey(params));

            if (!result){
              ctx?.response.status= 401;

              return ([false]);
            }else{console.log('Found user', result)}

      }catch(error){
          console.log("Error occurred", error)};

        const response = await fetch(`https://reqres.in/api/users/${ctx?.params['userId']}`, {method: 'PUT'}); // Updating existing user key

          if (response?.status === 200 || response?.status == "200") return [true];
    }catch(error){console.log("Error occurred", error)};

        ctx.response.status = 418;
      })

// Start listening on port 5000
await app.listen({ port: 3000 });
